title: warreella venusta
intro: Warreella venusta, also known as Yellow Passion Flower or Passion Flower, is a perennial flowering vine native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, sedative, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Warreella venusta include relieving anxiety and insomnia, reducing inflammation, and soothing muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
